name: test-automation-framework
description: Playwright + Cucumber BDD test automation framework covering functional (UI/API) and non-functional (accessibility/performance) testing

scripts.test:all: cross-env NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 npx cucumber-js --config cucumber.config.js --profile all
scripts.test:functional: cross-env NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 npx cucumber-js --config cucumber.config.js
scripts.test:non-functional: cross-env NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 npx cucumber-js --config cucumber.config.js --profile nonfunctional
scripts.test:api: cross-env NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 npx cucumber-js --config cucumber.config.js --profile api
scripts.test:ui: cross-env NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 npx cucumber-js --config cucumber.config.js --profile ui
scripts.test:ui:headed: cross-env HEADLESS=false NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 npm run test:ui
scripts.test:accessibility: cross-env NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 npx cucumber-js --config cucumber.config.js --profile accessibility
scripts.test:accessibility:headed: cross-env HEADLESS=false NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 npm run test:accessibility
scripts.test:performance: cross-env NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 npx cucumber-js --config cucumber.config.js --profile performance
scripts.test:smoke: cross-env NO_COLOR=1 FORCE_COLOR=0 npx cucumber-js --config cucumber.config.js --tags "@smoke"
